title: Brainstorm: First Settlement
description: Sling idea agents to brainstorm the first settlement in this new world. What is this place, what do people do here, what makes it interesting?
closeReason: Brainstormed first settlement: Haul's Rest, a river-ford waystation turned permanent town. Local lens pitch sent. Haulers' Guild vs. settler conflict, mundane economy (farrier/bonesetter/harness repair), no cliches.

title: Create Caltworks settlement file
description: Write vault/Compendium/World Atlas/Settlements/Caltworks.md. Salt-rendering town that grew from seasonal camp. Calt family controls evaporation flats by squatter's right. Newer arrivals resent salt tithe. Most powerful person: woman who decides whose salt gets weighed first. White-crusted streets, brine/woodsmoke smell. No walls, no defensible position.
closeReason: Created Caltworks.md: salt-rendering settlement with Calt family tithe conflict, Harla Calt as weighing yard gatekeeper, degrading flats as hidden GM pressure.

title: Create Caltworks NPCs and registry
description: Write 2-3 NPC files in vault/Compendium/NPCs/ and update vault/NPCRegistry.md. Key NPCs: (1) The salt weigher, the de facto most powerful person in town. (2) A Calt family head who claims ownership of the flats. (3) A newcomer hauler who represents the resentment. Ground these in the salt economy.
closeReason: Created Maren Seedeck, Oran Calt, Dessa Vael NPC files and updated NPCRegistry.md. Three NPCs grounded in Caltworks salt economy with distinct motivations and interconnected tensions.

title: Fix NPC references in Caltworks.md
description: Replace Harla Calt references with Maren Seedeck, replace Pem Varsk references with Dessa Vael, and add Oran Calt as notable resident. The worldwriter and charwriter used different names; the charwriter names are canonical.
closeReason: Fixed NPC references in Caltworks.md: Harla Calt -> Maren Seedeck, Pem Varsk -> Dessa Vael, added Oran Calt. Updated GM secrets to match canonical charwriter files.
